gamerule.vanilla-outsider-better-dogs.bd: Enable Storm Anxiety
If true, wolves will whine and shake in fear during thunderstorms depending on personality (Pacifist has 3x anxiety, Aggressive is immune). Default: true.
Enable Cliff Safety
If true, prevents wolves from pathfinding or chasing targets off high cliffs or into deep voids to avoid fall damage. Default: true.
Enable Low Health Fleeing
If true, all wolves (tamed and wild) will attempt to flee from combat when health falls below 30%, with probability depending on personality. Default: true.
Friendly Fire Protection
If true, prevents players from hurting their own tamed wolves with sweeping attacks or accidental direct hits. Default: true.
Dogs: Eat Raw Food
If true, tamed dogs will automatically consume dropped raw meat and rotten flesh from the ground to heal themselves. Default: true.
Dogs: Eat Cooked Food
If true, tamed dogs will automatically consume dropped cooked meat from the ground to heal themselves. Default: true.
Aggressive: HP Bonus
Bonus maximum health points (half hearts) applied to Aggressive personality wolves. Default: 20.
Aggressive: Speed (%)
Sprinting speed modifier in percent applied to Aggressive personality wolves. Default: 15 (which adds +15% speed).
Aggressive: Damage (%)
Attack damage modifier in percent applied to Aggressive personality wolves. Default: -15 (which reduces damage by 15%).
Aggressive: Follow Dist
Distance from owner at which Aggressive wolves will start running back to follow or teleport. Default: 10 blocks.
Aggressive: Chase Limit
Maximum distance from their anchor point or owner that Aggressive wolves will chase a target. Default: 50 blocks.
Aggressive: Detect Range
Range at which Aggressive wolves will actively search for and target hostile mobs. Default: 20 blocks.
Aggressive: Flee Chance (%)
Symmetric percentage chance for an Aggressive wolf to flee from combat when low on health (under 30%). Default: 10.
Pacifist: HP Bonus
Bonus maximum health points (half hearts) applied to Pacifist personality wolves. Default: 0.
Pacifist: Speed (%)
Sprinting speed modifier in percent applied to Pacifist personality wolves. Default: -10 (which reduces speed by 10%).
Pacifist: Damage (%)
Attack damage modifier in percent applied to Pacifist personality wolves. Default: 15 (which adds +15% damage).
Pacifist: Knockback (%)
Percentage increase in knockback applied to Pacifist wolves' attacks. Default: 50 (which adds +50% knockback).
Pacifist: Follow Dist
Distance from owner at which Pacifist wolves will start running back to follow. Default: 6 blocks.
Pacifist: Flee Chance (%)
Symmetric percentage chance for a Pacifist wolf to flee from combat when low on health (under 30%). Default: 100.
Normal: Follow Dist
Distance from owner at which Normal wolves will start running back to follow. Default: 10 blocks.
Normal: Speed (%)
Sprinting speed modifier in percent applied to Normal personality wolves. Default: 0.
Normal: Damage (%)
Attack damage modifier in percent applied to Normal personality wolves. Default: 0.
Normal: HP Bonus
Bonus maximum health points (half hearts) applied to Normal personality wolves. Default: 0.
Normal: Flee Chance (%)
Symmetric percentage chance for a Normal wolf to flee from combat when low on health (under 30%). Default: 50.
Baby Mischief (Permille)
Chance in permille (per 1000 ticks) for a baby wolf to trigger mischief like digging or playing. Default: 25 (2.5% chance per 50 seconds).
Blood Feud Chance (%)
Symmetric percentage chance for a wolf to hold a permanent grudge (Blood Feud) against a player who hits them. Default: 5.
Baby Retaliation (%)
Symmetric percentage chance for a baby wolf to retaliate and bite their owner when hit. Default: 50.
Spawn Chance: Normal (%)
Weighted chance for a wild wolf to spawn with the Normal personality trait. Default: 60.
Spawn Chance: Aggro (%)
Weighted chance for a wild wolf to spawn with the Aggressive personality trait. Default: 20.
Spawn Chance: Pacifist (%)
Weighted chance for a wild wolf to spawn with the Pacifist personality trait. Default: 20.
Breed: Same (Inherit) %
Percentage chance for an offspring to inherit the exact same personality if both parents share it. Default: 80.
Breed: Same (Variant) %
Percentage chance for an offspring to mutate to a random other personality when both parents have the same personality. Default: 10.
Breed: Mixed (Dominant) %
Percentage chance for an offspring to receive the dominant Normal trait when breeding a Normal wolf with another personality. Default: 40.
Breed: Mixed (Recessive) %
Percentage chance for an offspring to receive the recessive non-Normal trait when breeding a Normal wolf with another personality. Default: 40.
Breed: Diluted (Normal) %
Percentage chance for an offspring to dilute and revert to Normal when breeding an Aggressive wolf with a Pacifist wolf. Default: 50.
Breed: Diluted (Variant) %
Percentage chance for an offspring to inherit one of the parents' traits (diluted) when breeding Aggressive + Pacifist. Default: 25.
Howl Chance (Permille)
Chance in permille (per 1000 ticks) for a wolf to start a group pack howl. Default: 10 (1% chance per 50 seconds).
Pack Spread Distance
Minimum separation distance between wolves in a wild pack cluster (units in tenths of a block). Default: 20 (which is 2.0 blocks).
gamerule.vanilla-outsider-better-dogs.be: If true, enables detailed AI system logs and allows the vanilla Debug Stick to cycle wolf personality and scale. Default: false.
gamerule.vanilla-outsider-better-dogs.bd: Wild: Territorial Rivalry
If true, wild pack leaders will engage in territorial dominance disputes (wars, merges, retreats) upon encountering rival packs. Default: true.
Matrix: Aggro vs Aggro (War)
Chance for War (Fight) when two Aggressive leaders meet. Default: 80%.
Matrix: Aggro vs Aggro (Merge)
Chance for Merge (Yield) when two Aggressive leaders meet. Remaining chance is Retreat. Default: 10%.
Matrix: Aggro vs Normal (War)
Chance for War (Fight) when Aggressive and Normal leaders meet. Default: 50%.
Matrix: Aggro vs Normal (Merge)
Chance for Merge (Yield) when Aggressive and Normal leaders meet. Default: 40%.
Matrix: Aggro vs Pacifist (War)
Chance for War (Fight) when Aggressive and Pacifist leaders meet. Default: 10%.
Matrix: Aggro vs Pacifist (Merge)
Chance for Merge (Yield) when Aggressive and Pacifist leaders meet. Default: 50%.
Matrix: Normal vs Normal (War)
Chance for War (Fight) when two Normal leaders meet. Default: 20%.
Matrix: Normal vs Normal (Merge)
Chance for Merge (Yield) when two Normal leaders meet. Default: 50%.
Matrix: Normal vs Pacifist (War)
Chance for War (Fight) when Normal and Pacifist leaders meet. Default: 5%.
Matrix: Normal vs Pacifist (Merge)
Chance for Merge (Yield) when Normal and Pacifist leaders meet. Default: 45%.
Matrix: Pacifist vs Pacifist (War)
Chance for War (Fight) when two Pacifist leaders meet. Default: 0%.
Matrix: Pacifist vs Pacifist (Merge)
Chance for Merge (Yield) when two Pacifist leaders meet. Default: 50%.
Territorial: Fatal War Chance %
Chance that a territorial war is 'to the death' rather than a yield/merge (Def: 5).
Territorial: 1v1 Disputes Only
If true, wild pack leaders only challenge rivals that are not already in a territorial dispute, preventing chaotic gang wars. Default: true.
Wild: Personality AI
If true, wild wolves express their personality traits (fleeing, passive target-avoidance, etc.) while following their pack leader. Default: true.
Territorial Search Radius
The distance in blocks at which wild pack leaders scan for and detect rival pack leaders to challenge. Default: 96.
Wolf Pack Cluster Size
The maximum size limit of a single wild wolf pack cluster spawning together. Default: 8.
Wolf Spawn Density Boost
The percentage chance for a newly spawned pack to summon additional pack reinforcements nearby, boosting spawn density. Default: 0.
Wolf: Litter Max Size
The maximum number of puppies that can be born to a tamed wolf pair in a single breeding session. Default: 4.
Wolf: Litter Extra Chance (%)
Percentage chance for each additional puppy to spawn in the litter after the first, up to the litter max size. Default: 20.
config.betterdogs.title: Vanilla Outsider: Better Dogs Configuration
config.betterdogs.warning: WARNING: Changes made here only affect the baseline defaults for NEW worlds. To configure your active/existing world, use the in-game /gamerule screen or command instead.
text.betterdogs.guard_deactivated: Guard Mode Deactivated for %s. Following owner.
text.betterdogs.cured_inbred: %s has been cured of genetic inbreeding penalties!
gamerule.vanilla-outsider-better-dogs.bd: Pacifist Guard Buffs
If true, Pacifist dogs guarding an area apply Regeneration and Resistance to nearby owners. Default: false.
Enable Inbreeding Cure
If true, feeding a Golden Apple to an inbred wolf will cure its genetic penalties and restore normal attributes. Default: true.
Show Runt Particles
If true, tamed runt (inbred) wolves will subtly emit tiny rotten flesh particles to help players identify them. Default: false.
Aggressive Guard Patrol Range
The radius (in blocks) within which an Aggressive guard dog will patrol around its post. Default: 12.
Normal Guard Patrol Range
The radius (in blocks) within which a Normal guard dog will patrol around its post. Default: 0 (sitting/stationary).
Pacifist Guard Patrol Range
The radius (in blocks) within which a Pacifist guard dog will patrol around its post. Default: 3.
Tamed Pack Spread Multiplier
Scale factor for how much tamed wolves spread out when multiple are following the owner (units in percent). Default: 120 (1.2x multiplier).
Tamed Pack Spread Max Extra
The maximum extra spacing distance in tenths of a block added to tamed wolves follow range. Default: 60 (6.0 blocks).
Wild Pack Spread Multiplier
Scale factor for how much wild wolves spread out as the wild pack size increases (units in percent). Default: 80 (0.8x multiplier).
Wild Pack Spread Max Extra
The maximum extra spacing distance in tenths of a block added to wild wolves follow range. Default: 40 (4.0 blocks).
text.betterdogs.adoption_pending: %s is now ready for adoption! Another player can right-click them to claim.
text.betterdogs.adoption_cancelled_damag: Adoption cancelled for %s because they took damage!
advancements.betterdogs.husbandry.a_pack: Tame a wolf of each personality type: Normal, Aggressive, and Pacifist
Place a wolf of each personality type (Normal, Aggressive, and Pacifist) into Guard Mode using a bone while sneaking
advancements.betterdogs.husbandry.on_gua: Place a wolf into Guard Mode for the first time using a bone while sneaking
advancements.betterdogs.husbandry.inbred: Breed two closely related wolves and produce an inbred runt... yuck!
advancements.betterdogs.husbandry.outcro: Breed an inbred runt parent with an unrelated wolf to produce a healthy puppy and recover the lineage
advancements.betterdogs.husbandry.cure_r: Cure an inbred runt using a Golden Apple
advancements.betterdogs.husbandry.litter: Breed two tamed wolves to get a litter of 2 puppies
Breed two tamed wolves to get a litter of 3 puppies
Breed two tamed wolves to get a maximum litter of 4 puppies
Experience all litter sizes: get a litter of 2, 3, and 4 puppies at least once
advancements.betterdogs.husbandry.put_up: Put one of your tamed dogs up for adoption using a piece of paper while sneaking
advancements.betterdogs.husbandry.on_pat: Have your guarding Aggressive dog defeat a monster within its patrol radius
